title: The Country Flapper
writer: Nalbro Bartley, Harry Carr, Joseph Farnham
actors: Dorothy Gish, Glenn Hunter, Mildred Marsh
plot: Country girl Jolanda has lost her boyfriend, Nathaniel Huggins, to a "flapper" from the city. Jolanda blackmails Nathaniel's father into giving his permission for he and Jolanda to be married--but circumstances arise that may make...
